synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2627 Moderate: Oracle Linux 8 gcc-toolset-14-binutils security update
description:
[2.41-3.1]
- Fix a potential illegal memory access when linking a corrupt input file.  (RHEL-130636)

* Thu Feb 20 2025 Nick Clifton  <nickc at redhat.com>
- Backport fixes for PR 32082 and PR 32153 in order to fix the PR 20267 linker tests.

[2.41-3]
- NVR Bump to allow rebuilding with GTS-14 gcc.  (RHEL-53519)

[2.41-2]
- Fix s390x testsuite errors to allow building for RHEL-8.  (RHEL-30410)

[2.41-1]
- Initial import of upstream 2.41 release with patches from Fedora 40.  (RHEL-30410)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2627

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2627.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
gcc-toolset-14-binutils-2.41-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm
gcc-toolset-14-binutils-devel-2.41-4.el8_10.1.i686.rpm
gcc-toolset-14-binutils-devel-2.41-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm
gcc-toolset-14-binutils-gold-2.41-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm
gcc-toolset-14-binutils-gprofng-2.41-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
gcc-toolset-14-binutils-2.41-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm
gcc-toolset-14-binutils-devel-2.41-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm
gcc-toolset-14-binutils-gold-2.41-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm
gcc-toolset-14-binutils-gprofng-2.41-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/gcc-toolset-14-binutils-2.41-4.el8_10.1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-11083




Description of changes:

[2.41-3.1]
- Fix a potential illegal memory access when linking a corrupt input file.  (RHEL-130636)

* Thu Feb 20 2025 Nick Clifton  <nickc at redhat.com>
- Backport fixes for PR 32082 and PR 32153 in order to fix the PR 20267 linker tests.

[2.41-3]
- NVR Bump to allow rebuilding with GTS-14 gcc.  (RHEL-53519)

[2.41-2]
- Fix s390x testsuite errors to allow building for RHEL-8.  (RHEL-30410)

[2.41-1]
- Initial import of upstream 2.41 release with patches from Fedora 40.  (RHEL-30410)
